1.name: ZOMA BAFIX FOAM
1.purpose: cleaning agent designet to remove scale from bathroom surfaces
1.description: Cleaning agent designed to remove scale from bathroom surfaces.
doNotUse: Do not mix Zoma Bafix Foam with chlorine-containing products.
Do not use on acid-sensitive surfaces such as marble and others.

2.name: ZOMA GLASS CLEANER
2.purpose: streak-free glass and mirror cleaning solution
2.description: Zoma Glass Cleaner provides a streak-free shine on all glass surfaces, mirrors, and windows. Its advanced formula quickly removes fingerprints, smudges, and dirt without leaving residue.
instructionsForUse: Spray directly onto the glass surface
Wipe with a clean, dry cloth
Polish with circular motions for best results
doNotUse: Do not use on hot surfaces.
Avoid contact with wooden frames and painted surfaces.
2.store: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.

3.name: ZOMA FLOOR CLEANER PRO
3.description: Zoma Floor Cleaner Pro is a powerful concentrate designed for all types of hard floors including tile, laminate, vinyl, and sealed wood. Leaves a fresh scent and protective coating.
instructionsForUse: Mop the floor with the solution
doNotUse: Do not use on unsealed wood or natural stone without testing first.
Do not use undiluted on sensitive surfaces.
3.store: Keep in original container. Store at room temperature.

4.name: ZOMA DISH SOAP ULTRA
4.purpose: concentrated dishwashing liquid with grease-cutting power
4.description: Zoma Dish Soap Ultra cuts through tough grease and dried-on food with ease. Gentle on hands with added moisturizers. Creates rich, long-lasting suds for effective cleaning.
instructionsForUse: Apply small amount to sponge or directly to dishes
For tough grease, let soak for 5 minutes
doNotUse: Not for use in automatic dishwashers.
Avoid contact with eyes.
4.store: Store at room temperature. Keep out of reach of children.

5.name: ZOMA KITCHEN DEGREASER
5.description: Zoma Kitchen Degreaser is specifically formulated to tackle burnt-on grease, oil splatters, and tough kitchen grime on stoves, ovens, range hoods, and countertops.
doNotUse: Do not use on aluminum or copper surfaces.
Not suitable for painted or varnished surfaces.
5.store: Store upright in cool, dry place.

6.name: ZOMA TOILET BOWL CLEANER
6.purpose: powerful toilet cleaning gel with disinfectant
6.description: Zoma Toilet Bowl Cleaner is a thick gel formula that clings to the bowl surface, removing stains, limescale, and bacteria. Leaves toilets sparkling clean with a fresh scent.
instructionsForUse: Apply gel under the rim and around the bowl
doNotUse: Do not mix with other cleaning products, especially bleach.
Do not use on colored grout or natural stone.
6.store: Store in original bottle. Keep away from children and pets.

7.name: ZOMA BATHROOM TILE CLEANER
7.purpose: removes soap scum and water stains from tiles
7.description: Zoma Bathroom Tile Cleaner effectively removes soap scum, hard water deposits, and mildew stains from bathroom tiles and grout. Safe for daily use.
doNotUse: Avoid use on natural stone tiles without testing.
Do not use with bleach-based products.

8.name: ZOMA PAPER TOWELS PREMIUM
8.purpose: absorbent 3-ply paper towels for kitchen and cleaning
8.description: Zoma Premium Paper Towels are extra absorbent and strong, even when wet. Perfect for spills, cleaning surfaces, and drying dishes. Each roll contains 120 sheets.
instructionsForUse: Tear off desired number of sheets
Use for wiping, cleaning, or drying
doNotUse: Do not flush down toilet.
Not suitable for use as facial tissue.
8.store: Keep in dry place away from moisture.

9.name: ZOMA TOILET PAPER SOFT
9.description: Zoma Soft Toilet Paper combines softness with strength. Made from premium quality fibers, it's gentle on skin while being durable. Septic safe and biodegradable.
doNotUse: Do not use for other cleaning purposes.
9.store: Store in dry area. Protect from moisture.

10.name: ZOMA MICROFIBER CLOTHS SET
10.purpose: reusable microfiber cleaning cloths for all surfaces
10.description: Zoma Microfiber Cloths are ultra-absorbent and lint-free, perfect for cleaning glass, surfaces, electronics, and vehicles. Machine washable and reusable up to 500 times.
instructionsForUse: Air dry or tumble dry on low
doNotUse: Do not use fabric softener when washing.
Do not bleach or iron.
10.store: Store in clean, dry place when not in use.

11.name: ZOMA COTTON CLEANING RAGS
11.purpose: durable cotton rags for heavy-duty cleaning
11.description: Zoma Cotton Cleaning Rags are made from 100% recycled cotton. Highly absorbent and durable, ideal for workshops, garages, and industrial cleaning tasks.
instructionsForUse: Use for wiping, cleaning, or polishing
doNotUse: Not recommended for glass surfaces (may leave lint).
Avoid using with flammable liquids near open flames.
11.store: Keep in ventilated area. Wash before first use.

12.name: ZOMA ALL-PURPOSE CLEANER
12.purpose: versatile spray cleaner for multiple surfaces
12.description: Zoma All-Purpose Cleaner is suitable for countertops, appliances, walls, and most washable surfaces. Cuts through grease and grime while leaving a pleasant fresh scent.
instructionsForUse: For tough stains, let sit for 1-2 minutes
doNotUse: Do not use on wood or leather.
Test on inconspicuous area first for delicate surfaces.
12.store: Store at room temperature away from heat sources.

13.name: ZOMA DISINFECTANT SPRAY
13.purpose: antibacterial spray that kills 99.9% of germs
13.description: Zoma Disinfectant Spray eliminates 99.9% of bacteria and viruses on hard surfaces. Ideal for kitchens, bathrooms, door handles, and high-touch areas.
instructionsForUse: Allow to air dry for maximum effectiveness
doNotUse: Do not use on food contact surfaces without rinsing.
Not for use on skin or fabrics.
13.store: Store in cool place. Keep container closed when not in use.

14.name: ZOMA OVEN CLEANER
14.purpose: heavy-duty cleaner for ovens and grills
14.description: Zoma Oven Cleaner cuts through baked-on grease and carbon deposits in ovens, grills, and BBQ equipment. Works on cold or warm surfaces.
instructionsForUse: Close oven and leave for 30 minutes
doNotUse: Do not use on self-cleaning oven interiors.
Keep away from heating elements.
Do not use on aluminum.
14.store: Store upright. Keep away from heat and flames.

15.name: ZOMA FURNITURE POLISH
15.description: Zoma Furniture Polish cleans, shines, and protects wood furniture. Contains natural oils that nourish wood and create a protective barrier against dust and fingerprints.
instructionsForUse: Apply to furniture in circular motions
Buff to a shine with clean cloth
doNotUse: Do not spray directly onto furniture.
Not suitable for unfinished or waxed wood.
15.store: Store in upright position at room temperature.

16.name: ZOMA NAPKINS PREMIUM
16.description: Zoma Premium Napkins are soft, absorbent, and elegant. Perfect for everyday meals, parties, and special occasions. Available in white color.
instructionsForUse: Keep in dry place before use
doNotUse: Single use only - do not wash and reuse.
16.store: Store in original packaging. Protect from moisture.

17.name: ZOMA STAINLESS STEEL CLEANER
17.purpose: polish and protect stainless steel appliances
17.description: Zoma Stainless Steel Cleaner removes fingerprints, water spots, and smudges from refrigerators, dishwashers, sinks, and other stainless steel surfaces. Leaves a protective, streak-free shine.
instructionsForUse: Wipe in direction of grain with soft cloth
Buff to shine with dry cloth
doNotUse: Do not use on hot surfaces.
Not suitable for chrome or painted surfaces.
17.store: Keep in original container. Store at room temperature.

18.name: ZOMA DRAIN UNBLOCKER
18.purpose: powerful gel to clear blocked drains
18.description: Zoma Drain Unblocker is a thick gel formula that clings to pipes, dissolving hair, soap, grease, and other blockages. Safe for all pipes including PVC and metal.
instructionsForUse: Leave for 15-30 minutes (or overnight for tough clogs)
doNotUse: Do not use if drain is completely blocked.
Do not mix with other drain cleaners or chemicals.
Not suitable for use with plunger simultaneously.
18.store: Store upright in cool place. Keep tightly closed.
